prompt: A dramatic, low-key portrait of a young man use image for face reference with closed eyes, head tilted back, standing against a dark wall. A rectangular window light casts a sharp shadow and bright highlight on the wall behind him. The man is wearing a simple black V-neck shirt. Cinematic, moody lighting, deep shadows.
promptEn: A dramatic, low-key portrait of a young man use image for face reference with closed eyes, head tilted back, standing against a dark wall. A rectangular window light casts a sharp shadow and bright highlight on the wall behind him. The man is wearing a simple black V-neck shirt. Cinematic, moody lighting, deep shadows.
promptZh: 一张戏剧性的低调人像，年轻男子 闭着眼睛，头部向后倾斜，背靠深色墙壁，并使用图片作为面部参考。矩形窗光在身后的墙上投射出锐利的阴影和明亮的高光。男子穿着简单的 黑色 V 领衬衫。电影感、情绪化照明、深邃阴影。
